summary: Preserve Mixlayer's privacy firewall, reasoning ledger, model ladder, and cost proof commands on top of the generated OpenAI-compatible base.
reason: Mixlayer's differentiated value is the Qwen model ladder, reasoning_content, seed determinism, and free guard model; a plain chat wrapper would not provide the intended privacy-first workflow.
validated_outcome: go test ./... passes; local shield/model-query smoke tests exercise vault consistency, redaction, restructure, model cache, and SQL ledger access.
